summary: Passionate AI Engineer and Full-Stack Developer with 8+ years of experience building scalable solutions that drive business impact.
Specialized in machine learning, enterprise applications, and modern web technologies. Led teams of 15+ developers across multiple high-impact projects.
Champion of clean code, user-centric design, and emerging technologies. Recently won DICT OpenGov HacKathon 2025 for innovative AI solutions.
